opinion.h4: MILWAUKIE COMPANY OF JEHOVAH'S WITNESSES v. MULLEN ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OREGON. No. 767. Decided May 4, 1959.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: MINNEY v. CITY OF AZUSA, 359 U.S. 436 (1959)
opinion.p: 359 U.S. 436 MINNEY v. CITY OF AZUSA. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 768. Decided May 4, 1959.
Appeal dismissed for want of a properly presented federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a properly presented federal question.
